200.description: The current user, including their groups

hasPassword.description: False for SSO-only accounts, which have no local password to change.

pushOnChitchat.description: Push notifications for new chat messages (email variant not supported).

allowedPostTypes.description:
Post types you can create in this group (see `Post`'s `type`).
Always the resolved, effective list — never empty. A group an
admin hasn't restricted returns every type the server currently
supports, including ones added after the group was created.

chitchatEnabled.description: Whether this group has chat enabled (off by default, admin-controlled).

401.description: Missing, invalid, expired, or revoked credential
